title: Agentic Coding 两年，分享一下对圈内的看法（第二部分，有干货）
content: The author reflects on two years of "Vibe Coding" (AI-assisted programming), arguing it suits only specific users: those with broken or inefficient workflows, students learning engineering thinking alongside formal education, and people using it purely for entertainment. Effective use requires deep workflow understanding, which can be improved by having advanced LLMs (like DeepSeek V4 Pro) brainstorm with you. The author warns against blindly adopting new tools when existing workflows already function adequately, as complexity grows non-linearly.

title: 三星手机，隔几天会弹出一个广告，我用 logcat 看了看可能是来自于自带的“三星提醒”。
content: A Samsung phone user investigated periodic pop-up ads (white banners promoting Taobao red envelopes up to ¥26,888) using logcat analysis. The logs revealed Samsung's built-in "Reminder" app (sreminder) was responsible: it received scheduled job broadcasts, created TYPE_APPLICATION_OVERLAY floating windows above other apps, displayed the ad for approximately 3 seconds with animations, then removed it. The app used accessibility services to evade Samsung's FreecessController freezing, despite the user having no active reminders set.

title: AI时代的第一批鸡娃：我们仍旧热衷于制造神童 | 原文
content: Chinese parents are rushing to enroll young children—some as young as third grade—in AI education courses, driven by fear of falling behind. Marketing for these programs uses elite university credentials and claims about brain development to attract anxious families. The trend reflects a persistent cultural obsession with manufacturing prodigies, now repackaged for the AI era with buzzwords like "prompt engineering" and "competitive advantage."

title: 我要给 GLM5.2 道歉
content: The author apologizes for previously calling GLM5.2 overrated after discovering they had tested the less capable "high" mode instead of "max." Deep testing of GLM5.2 max/ultra code shows comparable performance to Claude Opus 4.8 with good accuracy and minimal issues. Downsides include a 5-hour usage limit during peak hours on the Pro tier. The author expresses genuine encouragement for a domestic Chinese model reaching this capability level.

title: 卖掉公司，50位员工实现财富自由
content: SpaceX is acquiring Anysphere, the parent company of AI coding tool Cursor, for $60 billion. Founded in 2022 by four MIT students, Anysphere grew rapidly, reaching over $1 billion in annual revenue and 1 million daily users. The acquisition will make the four co-founders billionaires and the first 50 employees wealthy through equity payouts, highlighting the extraordinary wealth creation in the AI sector.

title: 想问问有什么比较好的 AI 工作流真正的能提高工作效率
content: The user seeks AI workflow tools that boost daily productivity for non-programmers, including personal life. They currently use DingTalk DWS with Claw for daily reports, and want AI to automate repetitive low-stakes decisions like scheduling, grocery lists, food expiration tracking, calorie counting, and exercise logging. They prefer an aggressive approach—letting AI take over such decisions even if imperfect. Examples include using OpenClaw to estimate meal calories from photos. The core problem is that tedious tasks waste mental energy and are easily forgotten.</think>A user seeks AI tools to automate repetitive daily decisions beyond programming, including personal life tasks. title: 股市没有新鲜事
content: The author, a 16-year veteran investor, reflects on recent market volatility and sector divergence, emphasizing value investing principles through Buffett's lens. He notes how institutional investors manipulate prices before earnings seasons to shake out retail holders, citing historical examples like bank stocks (2011-2014) and shipping stocks where value ultimately prevailed. The piece analyzes geopolitical developments including the US-Iran ceasefire memorandum and its implications for energy markets, predicting sustained oil price strength and strong Q2 performance for petroleum and coal companies. The author details holdings in energy, mining, and insurance sectors, defending investment decisions through fundamental analysis while advocating emotional discipline—using Odysseus resisting sirens as metaphor for ignoring price fluctuations. The essay concludes with a self-comparison to persevering heroes, urging patience and conviction in value investing despite market irrationality.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 润哥

title: Claude App 并不那么好用
content: The Claude Mac desktop app lags behind competitors Codex and Zcode in several areas. It lacks incremental diff views for code changes, relying instead on plain text summaries. Editor integration is weaker, with no direct line-level navigation to VSCode. The @-mention file search has permission and case-sensitivity issues, and filename matching is unreliable.

title: 美伊在瑞士开始谈判，巴基斯坦和卡塔尔与会，各方手握哪些关键筹码？谈判能顺利进行吗？
content: U.S. and Iranian delegations began technical talks in Bürgenstock, Switzerland on June 21, following a memorandum of understanding. U.S. Vice President Vance, Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi, and representatives from Pakistan and Qatar—which brokered the mediation—attended. The U.S. aims to establish negotiation frameworks and may offer Iran access to frozen funds for humanitarian purchases in exchange for allowing UN nuclear inspectors access to bombed facilities. Iran prioritizes ending the Lebanon conflict and warns the deal could collapse if U.S. commitments are unfulfilled.

title: AI巨头的“Token补贴大战”，快打完了吗？
content: AI companies are heavily subsidizing token costs—some premium subscriptions are subsidized up to 70x. Unlike past "subsidy wars" like ride-sharing, AI tokens lack lock-in effects; users can switch providers instantly. Google, with its $300B annual ad revenue, can sustain token price cuts of 80% that would devastate OpenAI and Anthropic, which rely on investor funding and face IPO pressure. Two endgame scenarios exist: platform monopoly or commoditized utility. The latter—tokens becoming infrastructure like electricity—seems more likely given minimal switching costs. The competition may produce no clear winner, just sustained low prices benefiting users.

title: [开源] 带领 AI 团队开发了一个极轻量的 GT AI Gateway：支持协议转换、请求查看，还能大幅降低 Claude Code 等调用成本
content: GT AI Gateway is an open-source lightweight AI model gateway developed by TogoSpace AI Team. It features intelligent request interception with caching optimization that reduces API costs by over 10x, bidirectional protocol conversion between OpenAI and Anthropic formats, a traffic analysis dashboard for debugging requests, and multi-tenant token management with quotas and usage controls. Deployment options include Cloudflare Workers, desktop apps for Mac/Windows via Tauri, and Docker.

title: Developers don't understand CORS (2019)
content: A 2019 discussion on Hacker News revealed that many developers lack understanding of Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS), a web security mechanism. The conversation highlighted common misconceptions and confusion about how CORS policies work, why browsers enforce them, and how to properly configure cross-origin requests. Participants noted that developers often misunderstand the distinction between same-origin and cross-origin requests, leading to implementation errors and security vulnerabilities in web applications.

title: GRPO过时了吗？
content: Zhipu released GLM-5.2, a fully open-source 744B-parameter MoE model with MIT license, on June 13. GLM-5.2's key technical shift is abandoning GRPO for long-horizon reinforcement learning, instead reintroducing a value network (critic) with PPO to handle variable-length agent trajectories. This move challenges GRPO's status as the default open-source training method, revealing that algorithm choice is becoming task-dependent: GRPO remains effective for short verifiable tasks like math and coding, but struggles with long-horizon, sparse-reward agent tasks. The change is supported by both industrial practice and academic research, signaling that open-source model training must evolve beyond fixed paradigms as agents tackle increasingly complex, real-world tasks.

title: Codex 的周额度怎么还会增加？
content: A Codex 5x user reported their weekly quota unexpectedly increased from 13% to 43% overnight, despite no reset being scheduled until the 25th. The user had used most of their quota within two days through heavy usage. They observed the quota percentage moved in reverse without explanation, questioning whether Codex can now decrease usage counts retroactively.

The author argues that valuable viewpoints require objectivity and replicability. Traders should focus on practical benefits rather than worshipping figures like Buffett. Market advantages are often temporary—whether US market dominance, A-share limit-up systems, or AI booms. Without sustained positive feedback, traders stagnate. True "self-centeredness" means personal accountability: genuine passion, continuous improvement, and actual profitability matter more than adopting others' success formulas uncritically.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 股价搬运工

title: 芯片设备“铁律”，正在被打破
content: AI demand is reshaping semiconductor equipment dynamics. SK Hynix's suppliers are requesting 3-4% price increases, breaking the long-standing buyer dominance where fabs annually pressured 10% cuts. TCB bonding equipment faces surging demand for HBM4 production, with Hanmi Semiconductor holding 71% market share, though SK Hynix is diversifying to ASMPT and Hanwha. Hybrid bonding adoption is delayed; TCB remains viable for HBM4 due to relaxed height specs and technical readiness. Testing equipment faces component shortages—FPGA lead times stretched to 52 weeks as AI datacenters prioritize chip allocation. SEMI projects equipment sales reaching $156 billion by 2027, driven by advanced logic, HBM memory expansion, and packaging capacity.

title: “现在的油车，就是当年的马车”
content: Volkswagen board member Martin Sander compares gasoline cars to horse-drawn carriages, arguing electric vehicles will win through consumer choice rather than bans. He believes improving charging infrastructure, lowering costs, and highlighting EV benefits like quieter operation and lower maintenance will naturally drive adoption, potentially leaving only 3-5% wanting fuel vehicles by 2035. Similarly, Chinese auto influencer Han Lu predicts pure EVs will dominate 80-90% of new non-off-road vehicles by 2029. Data shows China's EV penetration already leads in lower price segments, with gasoline car sales dropping 39% year-over-year in May 2026. However, market adjustments continue, with Europe softening zero-emission mandates and the U.S. seeing EV sales decline amid reduced subsidies.

title: 如何看待王树国辟谣「福耀科技大学不发课本只发岗位清单」，称「对学生知识基础要求严，数学用英文教材」？
content: Fuyao University of Technology president Wang Shuguo refuted rumors that the university distributes job lists instead of textbooks. He emphasized strict academic standards, noting that mathematics courses use English-language textbooks taught by European Academy of Sciences members. In 2025, the university enrolled 50 undergraduates from five provinces with a minimum admission score of 616. Wang defended students choosing this new research-focused institution over prestigious 985 universities, stating that innovative universities represent global educational reform aligned with technological revolution.

Tungsten hexafluoride faces structural supply shortages in semiconductor specialty gases. Global demand grows ~20% annually due to wafer fab expansion and chip-stacking advances, while high-purity tungsten powder export controls constrain raw material supply. Effective global capacity is only ~6,700 tons versus 2026 demand exceeding 7,500 tons, creating an 800+ ton gap. Japanese suppliers face production halts from tungsten shortages, permanently losing market share. Domestic Chinese producers with stable high-purity output and overseas supply chain verification are securing long-term contracts. Prices reached 1.4-1.6 million yuan/ton domestically and 2-3 million yuan/ton internationally. No viable material substitutes exist due to cost and performance limitations.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 陆家嘴幽灵

title: 9600亿AI独角兽，又要融资了
content: Databricks, an AI data company valued at $134 billion, is seeking new funding at up to $175 billion valuation. Founded in 2013 by UC Berkeley researchers, it built the Apache Spark engine and now offers a unified platform for enterprises to manage data, train AI models, and deploy applications while maintaining security and compliance. With over $5.4 billion annual revenue and net revenue retention above 140%, Databricks serves 800+ customers spending over $1 million yearly. The company is expanding from data analytics to AI agents and enterprise AI infrastructure.

title: 大脑过载的5大反常信号，中招就说明你此刻判断力已经下滑了
content: Cognitive overload impairs judgment while producing deceptive signs of competence. A 2011 study of Israeli judges showed parole approval rates dropped from 65% to near zero before breaks, then recovered—demonstrating how mental fatigue biases decisions. Five warning signs include: feeling mentally sharp (actually narrowed focus), inflated confidence (from disabled self-critical thinking), excessive decisiveness (22% faster but less examined choices), irritability toward others (empathy depleted), and frequent careless errors in routine tasks. Prevention methods: establish pre-set decision rules for low-energy states, and schedule demanding cognitive work during peak mental hours, typically 2-4 hours after waking for early risers.

title: 2026 06 21 HackerNews
content: The EFF supports replacing the paid PACER court records system with a free, modernized platform. Video game composer Bobby Prince has died. Developers created a browser-based multiplayer Quake using CSS rendering to showcase web technology limits. Screens cannot display all visible saturated colors, especially blue-greens, which can be experienced in nature. The proposed U.S. JAWBONE Act would let individuals sue government officials for illegally pressuring platforms to remove protected speech. A developer encoded a webpage's HTML into a PNG favicon. The UK is considering age restrictions on VPNs to prevent children from bypassing social media bans. Americans express unease that SpaceX's S&P 500 inclusion forces retirement savings into the company. Windows 11's new media player uses 3.5x more RAM than the old version and charges for codecs. Early research indicates over-reliance on AI is degrading professional skills in medicine and software engineering.

title: 不止智商与情商：AI 时代，五大商决定你的不可替代性
content: In the AI era, human value extends beyond IQ and EQ to include three additional quotients. Trust Quotient: authentic accountability that machines cannot replicate, as they bear no moral responsibility. Diligence Quotient: sustained commitment with ownership for outcomes, not just task completion. Foresight Quotient: the uniquely human capacity to imagine and create unprecedented futures before data supports them, breaking from existing patterns rather than optimizing them. AI generates within known parameters; humans initiate what doesn't yet exist. Top leaders will combine all five quotients, with foresight becoming the decisive competitive advantage.

title: 腾讯：微信正在灰度测试 AI 助手「小微」
content: Tencent is testing an AI assistant called WeChat Xiaowei in limited release. The assistant supports text and voice commands to operate native WeChat features like adjusting settings, sending messages, and making calls. It uses multiple AI models including Tencent's self-developed models and quality open-source models. The gray-scale testing covers multiple operating systems, with participation eligibility determined by individual user interface access.

title: Manus的早期投资者计划以20亿美元价格回购该公司
content: Early investors plan to repurchase Manus for $2 billion, matching Meta's original acquisition price. China's anti-trust office had ordered the deal's cancellation. Strong revenue growth from $100 million to $400-500 million annually makes the price attractive. Meta has already separated operations and halted data sharing. Chinese investors HSG, ZhenFund, and Tencent will participate; U.S. firm Benchmark will not. Manus may restructure as a domestic joint venture to enable a Hong Kong IPO. Meta's willingness to accept the buyback remains uncertain.

title: 2024 诺贝尔化学奖得主詹珀离开谷歌 DeepMind，加入 Anthropic
content: Nobel Prize in Chemistry laureate John Jumper has left Google DeepMind after nearly nine years to join artificial intelligence startup Anthropic. Jumper, a senior research scientist, was one of the recipients of the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry.

title: 特朗普称他不认为 Anthropic 构成国家安全威胁
content: Trump stated in an interview that he does not currently consider Anthropic a national security threat, citing the company's responsible responses to requests. He noted this view might have differed a week prior, praised CEO Dario Amodei as capable and intelligent, and expressed no intention of shutting the company down.

title: 奖金差距逼近 100 倍：三星内部矛盾激化，部分员工身着黑衣集体抗议
content: Samsung's internal conflict escalates as departmental bonus gaps near 100-fold. Device Experience (DX) employees protested in black clothing and masks after Semiconductor (DS) staff received approximately 600 million won in bonuses, while mobile division workers expect only about 6 million won—roughly 1% of their semiconductor counterparts' payouts.

title: 大学生维权促使海南航空修改运输规定：只要航司原因造成航班提前，无论提前多久都能全额退票
content: Hainan Airlines revised its transport rules after a university student sued over a flight moved up by 10 minutes. The new policy allows full refunds or free rebooking for any airline-caused schedule advance, regardless of duration. Previously, changes under 15 minutes incurred fees. The student won reimbursement for accommodation costs. Several other Chinese airlines, including Tianjin Airlines and Spring Airlines, subsequently adopted similar policies.

title: 创纪录 IPO 后，SpaceX 再发债 200 亿美元
content: SpaceX plans its first bond issuance of at least $20 billion following its record IPO, targeting AI and orbital data center development. The company's net debt is projected to exceed $400 billion by 2031, with capital expenditures surpassing $1 trillion, primarily directed toward AI operations and space-based data center construction.

The common factor: mothers becoming overly close with teachers via WeChat, sharing excessive personal information about children's home behavior, which damaged the parent-child relationship and the child's standing at school.
